female.text: Frotomania; powerful lascivious impulses; leucorrhœa; hysteria. Lascivious ideas and dreams

keynotes.text: color="#800000">ORIGANUM MAJORANA Sweet Marjoram (ORIGANUM) Acts on nervous system generally, and is effective in masturbation and excessively aroused sexual impulses. Affections of the breasts (Bufo). Desire for active exercise impelling her to run.
